column1: # Custom partition table for 8 MB flash on the XIAO ESP32-S3.
# Single-app (no OTA) layout — gives us the most flash room for app + FS.
# OTA would have added an 8 KB otadata partition and a second app slot
# both of which we don't need for our update flow (serial reflash).
#   spiffs    ~3 MB  — LittleFS rules dir + future user data
# Subtype 'spiffs' is what PIO / esptool look for when uploading a LittleFS
# image; the on-disk format is still LittleFS (board_build.filesystem
# WARNING: switching to this table from a different layout wipes NVS. Settings
# revert to defaults on the first boot after flashing. Subsequent boots are
